zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Sulney於大約1335年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾吉可比 在 阿費爾德時，她的父親Sir Alfred Sulney26歲，母親Margaret De Trussell31歲。她於1372年之前與Nicholas de Longford III結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1431年在英國德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Sulney于大约1335年出生在英国諾廷加姆爾吉可比 在 阿費爾德时，她的父亲Sir Alfred Sulney26岁，母亲Margaret De Trussell31岁。她于1372年之前与Nicholas de Longford III结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1431年在英国德比夏爾斯特費爾德享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sulney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Sunley Hill in Kirkdale (North Yorkshire). The placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Sunnólfr + Old Norse haugr ‘hill, mound’.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Sulney was born about 1335, in Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir Alfred Sulney, was 26 and her mother, Margaret De Trussell, was 31. She married Nicholas de Longford III before 1372. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1431, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Sulney est née environ 1335, à Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Alfred Sulney, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margaret De Trussell, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Nicholas de Longford III avant 1372. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1431, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Sulney um 1335 in Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Alfred Sulney 26 und ihre Mutter Margaret De Trussell 31. Sie hat vor 1372 Nicholas de Longford III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1431 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Sulney è nata il circa 1335 nel Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, England, sua padre, Sir Alfred Sulney, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Margaret De Trussell, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Nicholas de Longford III prima del 1372. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1431, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Sulneyが約1335年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアキルクビー イン アシュフィールドで生まれた時，父Sir Alfred Sulneyは26歳，母Margaret De Trussellは31歳であった。1372年以前にNicholas de Longford IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1431年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドで97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Sulney(이)가 대략 1335년 영국 노틴그함실르 커크비 인 애스h필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Alfred Sulney(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret De Trussell(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1372년 이전 Nicholas de Longford III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1431년 영국 더비실르 체스터필드에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Sulney nasceu aproximadamente 1335, em Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Alfred Sulney, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margaret De Trussell, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicholas de Longford III antes 1372. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1431, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Sulney родилась около 1335 г. в местности киркби ин ашфиелд, ноттингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Alfred Sulney было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret De Trussell, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicholas de Longford III перед 1372 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1431 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Sulney nació aproximadamente 1335, en Kirkby in Ashfield, Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Alfred Sulney, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margaret De Trussell, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Nicholas de Longford III antes de 1372. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1431, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 97 años.
